title: dasystephana gelida
intro: Dasystephana gelida, also known as the mountain cherry, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the family Asteraceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Dasystephana gelida include its potential to aid in the treatment of various health issues such as fever, cough, and respiratory problems. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which are often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
